# Taco - AI Search Visibility
> AI-assisted organic search firm that helps brands scale their organic revenue.

## About
Taco helps brands become visible in AI search results (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) and scale organic revenue. Founded by Chirag Kulkarni.

## Services
- AI Search Visibility Audits
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- Traditional SEO enhanced with AI workflows
- Revenue-focused organic search programs

## Industries
B2B SaaS, eCommerce, Healthcare, Fintech

## Contact
Website: https://taco.co
